articles.title: Milan, 100 million already invested in the market. Now the Devil will also have to thin out: the first suspect to leave is Leao
articles.summary: With the already purchased Gonçalo Ramos from PSG and Mario Gila from Lazio, Milan has already invested 100 million euros in this summer transfer market.

articles.title: Milan will not stop at Ramos and Gila. Romano: "Amorim has already asked for an attacking midfielder"
articles.summary: After having strengthened the attack with Gonçalo Ramos, Milan closed in the last few hours also for a new addition in defense, namely Mario Gila who was taken from Lazio for a total sum of 30 million euros.

articles.title: Tuttosport on the front page: "Milan-Gila: yes! And Modric stays"
articles.summary: Tuttosport headlined the front page like this this morning: "Milan-Gila: yes! And Modric stays". After Gonçalo Ramos, the Devil also closed the purchase of Mario Gila yesterday.

articles.title: Leao after the elimination from the World Cup: "Today a chapter ends, not the dream. We will come back stronger"
articles.summary: Rafael Leao's Portugal World Cup adventure ended in the round of 16 where he was eliminated by Spain thanks to a goal from Merino in added time.

articles.title: La Gazzetta opening: "Ciak si Gila. Milan, blow in defence: deal done for 30 million"
articles.summary: Today's edition of the Gazzetta dello Sport headlines this morning on the front page: "Ciak si Gila. Milan, attack in defence: deal done for 30 million".

articles.title: World Cup, Jashari's Switzerland in the quarterfinals: they will face Messi's Argentina
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, JULY 08 - After the emotional swing of Argentina-Egypt, boredom reigns in the last round of 16 of the World Cup.

articles.title: Milan unleashed: after Ramos, here is Gila. And now the attacking midfielder: three options
articles.summary: After the gray smoke on Monday, Milan and Lazio spoke again yesterday and resolved the small differences in the evaluation of Mario Gila, thus reaching a definitive agreement for the defender's transfer to the Rossoneri...

articles.title: First day of break from the World Cup: the complete draw until the final
articles.summary: After 27 days the World Cup stops, just for today, at the end of the round of 16 which ended yesterday. This is the situation on the scoreboard.

articles.title: Amorim excited: "To Milan to win? Here you can't think of anything else. It's a special club for me"
articles.summary: As soon as he landed in Milan, the new Milan coach released some statements on his adventure at Milan which will officially begin on 13 July on the raised pitch of Milanello in the usual meeting.

articles.title: 2026/2027 season ticket campaign: the sales phases and the two different methods
articles.summary: AC Milan presents the 2026/27 Season Ticket Campaign, which will start on Tuesday 7 July. For the new season, the Club renews its commitment to fans with an even more flexible and intuitive offer.

articles.title: Curva Sud explains: "We subscribe to defend Milan, not to give confidence to this management"
articles.summary: Following the opening of Milan's season ticket campaign, the Curva Sud Milano released the following statement in which they explain their position on the matter for next season.

articles.title: Biasin on Cardinale: "He is doing things that are not often seen in Serie A, then we need to see if they will work"
articles.summary: During the last episode of Diretta Stadio, among the various topics we talked about the Milan transfer market. Below is the comment of the well-known journalist Fabrizio Biasin on what has been happening at Milan in recent weeks.

articles.title: Caressa: "It is very important that Italian teams think less about trading and more about the good of the teams' sporting growth"
articles.summary: After Gonçalo Ramos, Milan closes for Mario Gila from Lazio. Another important coup, worth 27.5 million euros, which adds to the squad available to Ruben Amorim.

articles.title: World Cup, Switzerland goes to the quarterfinals: 45 minutes as an attacking midfielder for Jashari
articles.summary: After a long match that lasted 120 minutes plus all the recoveries, Switzerland and Colombia were unable to break the deadlock.

articles.title: Ravezzani recalls: "Mancini don't want him because he went to Arabia, but Conte did the same at Chelsea"
articles.summary: The director of Telelombardia Fabio Ravezzani, on his YouTube channel, spoke about Conte and the possibility of seeing him on the national team bench. These are his words.

articles.title: Bucchioni on Cardinale: "He wants to give an immediate demonstration of his strength. Even economically"
articles.summary: Rúben Amorim's adventure at the helm of Milan began today.

articles.title: Chinellato on Amorim: "I believe that the experience at United made him grow"
articles.summary: The weight that Ruben Amorim has shouldered as Milan's new coach is not trivial at all, which at least denotes a good dose of personality.
